name_cn:
[Factory Version] Chanel 23A Mini 31bag Green Tweed
A fluffy teddy style~ Did this grow up eating cute things!! The new 31bag has a plush version, who can resist this! A limited item for Autumn/Winter, the level of popularity is obvious, incredibly soft touch, full of retro sentiment, the essence of the 31 is the lazy feel after folding~ Freshness as a shoulder bag or handbag, the calfskin body is amazing, the combination of leather chain and leather thin shoulder strap is just too lovely~
Size: 22*23*5.5cm
Model: AS4133
